title: Yithran #3506
definition:
Ithran = "advantage"

 1) an Edomite, son of Dishon, a Horite, and probably a phylarch of a
    tribe of the Horim
 2) an descendant of Asher
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ithran = "advantage"

 1) an Edomite, son of Dishon, a Horite, and probably a phylarch of a
    tribe of the Horim
 2) an descendant of Asher

    NASB:  an Edomite, also an Asherite
